caption: A man with light-colored, styled hair sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and glasses. He wears large black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, there is a wall with posters and a logo featuring a yellow shield. On the far left, a portion of another person wearing a green garment is partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and looks toward the right, with his facial expression shifting slightly as he speaks or listens. Red and white text overlays appear on the screen, featuring a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the chest up.
